lemmas.primary_translation: culturally advanced people / indigenous people / cultural practitioners

definitions.text: eldre betegnelse på folk med høyt utviklet teknologi og åndelig kultur
definitions.translation: older term for people with highly developed technology and spiritual culture

definitions.text: mennesker som arbeider eller driver med kunst, litteratur, teater, musikk og andre former for kultur
definitions.translation: people who work or are involved in art, literature, theater, music, and other forms of culture
